methodology.disclaimer: Cost estimates are based on published healthcare quality improvement literature and industry benchmarks. Actual costs vary significantly by hospital size, region, staffing levels, and existing infrastructure.
methodology.note: These are estimates for educational purposes. Hospitals should validate costs against their own data.

CLABSI Rate.cost_breakdown: Staff training ($5K), equipment and supplies ($7K), monitoring systems ($3K)
CLABSI Rate.source: Institute for Healthcare Improvement (IHI) - CLABSI Prevention Bundle
CLABSI Rate.citation: Pronovost et al. (2006). An intervention to decrease catheter-related bloodstream infections in ICUs. NEJM 355:2725-2732

Readmission Rate.cost_breakdown: Care coordination staff ($12K), telehealth tools and platforms ($6K), staff training and protocols ($4K)
Readmission Rate.source: Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) - Hospital Readmissions Reduction Program
Readmission Rate.citation: Jencks et al. (2009). Rehospitalizations among patients in Medicare fee-for-service programs. NEJM 360:1418-1428

Mortality Rates.cost_breakdown: Clinical consultant fees ($10K), decision support system implementation ($5K), multidisciplinary staff training ($3K)
Mortality Rates.source: Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality (AHRQ) - Clinical Decision Support Systems
Mortality Rates.citation: Kuperman et al. (2007). Medication-related clinical decision support in computerized provider order entry systems. J Am Med Inform Assoc 14:338-346

Safety Score.cost_breakdown: Patient Safety Officer/Coordinator ($5K), staff training program development ($4K), monitoring and reporting systems ($3K)
Safety Score.source: Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality (AHRQ) - Safety Culture Assessment
Safety Score.citation: Sorra & Dyer (2010). Multilevel Analyses of the AHRQ Hospital Survey on Patient Safety Culture. Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality
